name: Guide to Operational Technology Security
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-82 Rev 3 (2023) provides security guidance for Operational Technology (OT) — encompassing ICS, SCADA, distributed control systems, and other industrial environments. Renamed from 'ICS Security Guide' to broaden scope.
relationToCloudSecurity: OT-cloud convergence: increasingly relevant to cloud-hosted ICS/OT monitoring.
relationToAISecurity: AI in OT environments (predictive maintenance, anomaly detection) inherits 800-82 guidance.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

lifecycle.notes: Rev 3 published 2023-09-28. Renamed scope (was ICS-specific in Rev 2).

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.

notes: Metadata stub; acquire from NIST CSRC and extract.
